description: Manages tavern operations, cooking, brewing, and hospitality services
materialRequirements: Wood and stone for tavern, food preparation equipment

tieredBenefits.description: Can cook basic food items (follows cauldron level requirements)
Can brew mead in addition to cooking
Provides additional comfort bonus when monitoring feasts

randomTalk: Rule one of tavern keeping: the customer is always right. Rule two: the customer is frequently drunk and therefore not to be trusted. These rules coexist.
I've been told my mead could strip paint. I've also been told it could raise the dead. Both reviews were positive.
You know the difference between a good story and a great story? About four pints.
I once served a visiting jarl who said my stew tasted like dishwater. Joke's on him. I don't wash the dishes.
People ask me 'What's in the mead?' And I always say the same thing: 'Honey, water, and NONE OF YOUR BUSINESS.'
A fight broke out in here once. Twice. Seventeen times. Look, the number isn't important. What's important is the FURNITURE.
The secret ingredient is love. Just kidding, it's more mead.
There are two kinds of people in Valheim: those who can hold their drink, and those who redecorate my floor.
I clean the mugs between customers. Usually. Depends on the customer. Depends on the mug. Don't ask which one you've got.
That? That's not a stain. That's CHARACTER. This tavern has tremendous character. Mostly on the ceiling.
The Farmer grows the barley. I improve the barley. The Farmer would disagree. The Farmer is wrong.
I've heard every excuse for not paying a tab. 'A draugr ate my coins' is popular. So is 'I'll pay when I'm Rested.' You're Rested NOW, Sven.
My previous tavern burned down. The one before that burned down. The one before THAT also burned down. But THIS one hasn't burned down YET, and that's basically a legacy.
Some say I pour too heavy. Those people are CORRECT and WELCOME.
What do I recommend? Everything. If I didn't recommend it, it wouldn't be on the menu. The menu is CURATED.
randomGreets: Welcome! Sit anywhere. Except there. That's Sven's chair. Don't ask. Just don't.
Come in, come in! What'll it be? We've got mead, slightly different mead, and MYSTERIOUS mead.
Ah! A face I don't recognize from last night's floor! Welcome!
Pull up a stool! And if the stool pulls back, that one's broken, use the next one.
You look like you've had a day. I've got just the thing. Several of the thing, actually.
Welcome to the finest establishment this side of wherever you came from!
randomGoodbye: Off already? Take a bread roll. No, I insist. It's yesterday's. No, I INSIST.
Good night! Walk home safe. If you can't walk, crawl home safe. Standards are flexible.
Don't forget: we open at dawn. Well, I open at dawn. I never actually CLOSE.
Come back tomorrow! Same drinks, same prices, same stain on the ceiling. Consistency is everything.
May your hangover be gentle and your memory selective!
